title: festuca duriuscula var. marginata
intro: Festuca duriuscula var. marginata, also known as a grass-like plant, is a variety of the Festuca duriuscula species, commonly found in mountainous regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Festuca duriuscula var. marginata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve lung function, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
